questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
Statements: Some books are files. All files are balls. All balls are plates. No plate is glass.

Conclusions: I. No glass is plate. II. Some balls are books. III. All plates are balls.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
Statements: All pens are cats. All cats are rats. All rats are snakes. All snakes are foxes.

Conclusions: I. Some snakes are cats. II. All snakes are rats. III. Some cats are pens.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
Statements: Some shirts are pants. All pants are caps. All caps are ties. No tie is socks.

Conclusions: I. No cap is socks. II. Some pants are shirts. III. All caps are pants.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
Statements: All boxes are foxes. All foxes are schools. No school is college. All colleges are markets.

Conclusions: I. No fox is college. II. No college is school. III. No box is fox.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
Statements: Some leaves are flowers. No flower is fruit. Some fruits are branches. Some branches are stems.

Conclusions: I. Some leaves are stems. II. All leaves are either stems or fruits. III. All stems are either branches or fruits.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
Statements: Some caps are umbrellas. Some umbrellas are raincoats. All raincoats are trousers. All trousers are jackets.

Conclusions: I. Some raincoats are caps. II. Some trousers are umbrellas. III. All raincoats are jackets.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
Statements: Some fans are coolers. Some coolers are machines. Some machines are computers. All computers are televisions.

Conclusions: I. Some televisions are machines. II. Some machines are fans. III. No machine is a fan.

choices.c: Only either II or III follows
choices.d: Only I and either II or III follow

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
Statements: All keys are staplers. All staplers are blades. Some blades are erasers. Some erasers are sharpeners.

Conclusions: I. Some sharpeners are keys. II. All keys are blades. III. Some erasers are keys.
